overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 depicting a nighttime walk through a futuristic neon-lit metropolis. The player character traverses wet sidewalks, ascends illuminated stairs, moves through a covered walkway with cyan neon pillars, and continues along dense urban streets with large digital billboards and reflective surfaces.

scene_state.functional_zone: city sidewalk with adjacent street and building entrance stairs

events.description: futuristic sedan drives past on the right side of the street
begins turning toward the concrete stairs on the left

agents.ego_description: walking along the wet city sidewalk, approaching a set of illuminated stairs

notable_agents.action: person in red jacket walking toward the camera on the sidewalk

entered.detail: wide concrete staircase with blue illuminated edges leading up to building entrance
tall building with purple and blue neon accent lighting
reflective concrete pavement showing neon light reflections
sleek dark vehicle driving on the multi-lane street

segments.scene_description: Walking along a wet city sidewalk at night, passing a pedestrian in a red jacket while a futuristic sedan drives by on the adjacent street. The camera approaches a wide concrete staircase with blue illuminated edges on the left, leading up to a modern building entrance.

scene_state.functional_zone: building entrance stairs and lobby transition

events.description: ascends from street level up the illuminated concrete stairs
enters the covered building area with glass doors

agents.ego_description: climbing the wide concrete stairs with blue edge lighting, entering a modern building

entered.detail: large glass doors leading into the building interior
tall vertical cyan neon light strips flanking the entrance

segments.scene_description: Ascending the illuminated concrete stairs from street level, transitioning from the open sidewalk into a semi-covered building entrance. The environment shifts from outdoor neon lighting to a mix of interior and exterior light as the camera approaches the glass doors flanked by vertical cyan neon pillars.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway with neon lighting

events.description: enters long covered walkway with reflective flooring
continues walking straight through the corridor passing vertical neon pillars

agents.ego_description: walking through a futuristic covered corridor with highly reflective floors and cyan neon pillars

entered.detail: highly polished dark floor reflecting the cyan neon lights
transparent walls showing the city outside
green plants in planters along the walkway

segments.scene_description: Moving through a long, covered pedestrian walkway characterized by tall vertical cyan neon pillars and a highly reflective marble floor that mirrors the lighting. The corridor features glass walls on one side revealing the city outside, creating a futuristic indoor environment distinct from the street level.

events.description: exits the covered walkway back into the open city plaza
turns right to follow the plaza pathway
futuristic vehicle passes by on the adjacent street

agents.ego_description: exiting the building and turning right to walk along an open plaza with modern architecture

notable_agents.action: silhouetted figure walking ahead on the plaza pathway

entered.detail: modern building with green illuminated windows and balconies
large screen displaying advertisements with red and white graphics
elevated roadway structure crossing above the street ahead

segments.scene_description: Exiting the covered walkway into an open plaza with wet paved tiles reflecting the city lights. The camera turns right to follow the pathway, passing a modern glass office tower with green lighting on the left while approaching a highway overpass. A large curved digital billboard displays red advertisements on the right side of the plaza.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban street with elevated overpass and dense signage

events.description: continues walking straight toward the overpass structure
passes under the shadow of the overpass structure

agents.ego_description: walking along the wet street toward an overpass, passing large digital billboards on the right

notable_agents.action: person standing near the street taking a photo or looking at device

entered.detail: tall pole with horizontal neon light fixture

segments.scene_description: Continuing along the wet urban street toward the highway overpass, with the large curved billboard now prominent on the right. The camera passes a pedestrian standing near the street and moves under the shadow of the approaching overpass structure, surrounded by dense neon signage and futuristic architecture.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a rain-slicked city sidewalk into a sterile neon corridor before emerging back into a dense urban plaza. It begins by moving past a pedestrian and a futuristic sedan on a wet street, approaching a wide concrete staircase with blue illuminated edges. As the camera ascends these stairs, the environment shifts from the open night air into a semi-covered entrance flanked by vertical cyan neon pillars. The scene then expands into a long, reflective pedestrian walkway with marble floors and glass walls before exiting back into an open plaza of wet paved tiles. Finally, the camera turns right past a green-lit office tower and a large curved red billboard, moving under the shadow of a highway overpass surrounded by towering futuristic architecture.
